It carries a $1,000 MSRP direct from the brand, but we’ve been more often seeing it stay between $600 and $700 outside of major sales. We last saw this model getting a flash sale to $550 at the top of March, but you’re getting even more savings and the best price ever with this deal while it lasts. Until April 11, you’ll be able to pick one up with $200 slashed from the going rate (and $500 off the MSRP) for a new all-time low.

more…

items.title: Get 5 years of ChatGPT, Gemini, Sonar, and more at over $100 off
items.summary:
AI apps can save time, but paying for multiple subscriptions is not viable long-term. If you rely on several different AI tools for your workflow, you’re functionally paying a fee just to do your job, and that’s not a price you’re ever done paying. ChatOn AI Assistant Premium is a new tool that combines popular AI tools like GPT and Sonar into one cohesive platform, and you can get a 5-year subscription on sale for $98 with code CHAT30 (Reg. $199.99).

more…

items.title: Slide Anker’s 240W 8-in-1 Prime charging station with smart app controls into your everyday bag at $100
items.summary:
Through its official Anker Amazon storefront, you can find the popular and compact 240W 8-in-1 Prime Charging Station back down at $99.99 shipped, which also matches the deal we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. Normally $130 at full price, the deal on this charging solution is returning things back to its pricing that we saw during last month’s Big Spring Sale. While we have seen it go lower to $90 before, this is still a solid 23% markdown that cuts $30 off the going rate for the second-best price we have tracked. You can also browse Anker’s official Amazon storefront here for even more models and deals.

more…

These official Nintendo books are sweet little additions to the game room collection and the real-life Rosalina’s Storybook brings the Super Mario Galaxy experience to life in its own special way. It features “actual art and story from Super Mario Galaxy,” a nice hardcover coffee tablet book-style construction, and makes for a great way to mark the release of The Super Mario Galaxy Movie this year.

items.title: Leaker claims Nintendo is readying a Super Metroid remake for Switch 2
items.summary:
Nintendo has a serious leak problem right now, as we have already discussed. It seems as though just about all of its major 2026 releases have already surfaced online, leaving very little to the imagination when it comes to the upcoming summer and holiday Switch 2 release schedule. There are couple of other titles that have been mentioned among the leaks and, while they don’t come from sources quite as reliable as some of the others, if they do end up coming to fruition we could be in for a new Wario Land game and a potential new classic Metroid remake this year.
